Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS AMIT GHOSH and ANA GHOSH DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off-calendar. Case settled. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off-calendar. Case settled. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony Soldato, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman, Tel. 415.956.8100, for Plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court vacated the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AMIT GHOSH and ANA GHOSH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar. The court signed an order allowing plaintiff to file a first amended complaint. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:

RULING: The court vacated the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar. The court signed an order allowing plaintiff to file a first amended complaint. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
